body:
## Rationale

**Priority: 🔴 CRITICAL — broken relatedAlbum references + content gap**

Two live articles reference `slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup` as a `relatedAlbum` in `albumArticles.js` but the article does not exist:
- `iowa-drum-setup` (relatedAlbums array)
- `we-are-not-your-kind-drum-setup` (relatedAlbums array)

Confirmed via `grep 'slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — 2 hits, 0 matching articles.

This is the same class as #1857 (broken relatedAlbum slugs) and #2145 (broken soundLikeGuide slugs) — active 404 bug on internal links.

**GSC signal:** Joey Jordison is our #1 query by impressions — 85 impr, pos 8.5, only 2 clicks. Iowa ✓, AHIG (ai-fix #2153), Vol.3 (#2383) — the debut is the ORIGIN story and the most obvious missing article.

**Content angle:**
- Joey's debut recording — 21 years old, Tama Rockstar kit, pre-endorsement era
- The album that defined nu-metal drums for a generation
- 5× Platinum, created the "Slipknot sound" — the founding drum setup before Iowa's stripped-down approach
- Search query: "slipknot original drum setup" + "joey jordison 1999 kit" + "slipknot debut drums"

## Files to touch

- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add new article entry with slug `slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup` (matches existing relatedAlbum references exactly)
- `/public/llms/articles/slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup.md` — LLM companion file

## Article spec

- **Slug:** `slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup`
- **Drummer:** Joey Jordison
- **Band:** Slipknot
- **Year:** 1999
- **Gear era:** Tama Rockstar kit, Zildjian A Custom cymbals (pre-endorsement/early endorsement transition), Tama Iron Cobra pedals
- **Word count:** ≥300 words
- **FAQ:** ≥3 Q&A ("What drums did Joey use on the debut?", "How did the debut kit differ from Iowa?", "What was Joey Jordison's first endorsement?")
- **Internal links:** ≥3 (iowa-drum-setup, the-gray-chapter-drum-setup, we-are-not-your-kind-drum-setup, joey-jordison-drum-setup)
- **Schema:** Article + FAQPage JSON-LD
- **relatedAlbums:** `['iowa-drum-setup', 'we-are-not-your-kind-drum-setup']`

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A
- ≥3 internal links
- Article JSON-LD + FAQPage JSON-LD
- LLM companion file created at correct path

## Verify

1. `grep 'slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` returns a full article object (not just relatedAlbums refs)
2. `ls public/llms/articles/slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup.md` exists
3. `curl https://metalforge.io/articles/slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup` returns 200
4. Internal links from iowa + we-are-not-your-kind to this article resolve (no 404)
5. Rich Results Test shows FAQPage schema

## Done

- [ ] `slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup` added to albumArticles.js
- [ ] LLM companion file created
- [ ] Broken relatedAlbum refs in iowa + we-are-not-your-kind now resolve
title: SEO: Slipknot 'Slipknot' (1999) drum setup article (Joey Jordison — fixes 🔴 broken relatedAlbum refs in iowa + we-are-not-your-kind)
